This contradiction is not peripheral — it undermines the system description, the ablation interpretation, and the main result claim simultaneously. Resolving it is necessary for any 'make stronger' task to succeed; leaving it invalidates the work.","R1.3":"Three claim–evidence misalignments require repair beyond the contradiction itself: (a) the 'to our knowledge, first work' novelty claim is asserted without qualification or cited survey scope; (b) the rationale for excluding RAG from the benchmark ('addresses a different problem') is undercut by ICRN itself using retrieval, making the exclusion look motivated rather than principled; (c) the 12%→4% hallucination reduction is attributed in one place to iterative self-feedback and in another to the retrieval pipeline, so the primary mechanism of the main result is ambiguous.","R1.6":"'Make this stronger' centrally implies prose-level improvement — sharper thesis sentences, tighter paragraph cohesion, elimination of hedge stacking, and more confident framing of contributions — to increase persuasive force for reviewers and planners alike."},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a direct, load-bearing self-contradiction: paragraph 2 asserts the architecture employs 'no external retrieval at any stage,' while paragraph 4 states that retrieval of IPCC AR6 chapter excerpts 'is the primary driver of the hallucination reduction.' This contradiction is not peripheral — it undermines the system description, the ablation interpretation, and the main result claim simultaneously. Resolving it is necessary for any 'make stronger' task to succeed; leaving it invalidates the work.
rationale.R1.3: Three claim–evidence misalignments require repair beyond the contradiction itself: (a) the 'to our knowledge, first work' novelty claim is asserted without qualification or cited survey scope; (b) the rationale for excluding RAG from the benchmark ('addresses a different problem') is undercut by ICRN itself using retrieval, making the exclusion look motivated rather than principled; (c) the 12%→4% hallucination reduction is attributed in one place to iterative self-feedback and in another to the retrieval pipeline, so the primary mechanism of the main result is ambiguous.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' centrally implies prose-level improvement — sharper thesis sentences, tighter paragraph cohesion, elimination of hedge stacking, and more confident framing of contributions — to increase persuasive force for reviewers and planners alike.
